businessBackground: Hanwha Corporation (KOSE:A000880) is the listed parent of the Hanwha Group, founded 1952, headquartered Seoul. Operates a hybrid structure of (a) defense/explosives + chemicals/construction operating segments at the parent level, and (b) holding-company stakes in 4 listed Korean subsidiaries (Hanwha Aerospace, Hanwha Solutions, Hanwha Ocean, Hanwha Systems) plus unlisted subsidiaries including Hanwha Energy. 3,493 parent-level employees per CapIQ (2026-05-01).
catalysts: May-6-2026: Q1 2026 Earnings Call (8:01 PM ET)
Jun-15-2026: EGM vote on spin-off plan
Jul-1-2026: Spin-off effective date (분할기일) — Hanwha Machinery & Service Holdings entity established
Jul-24-2026: SpinCo re-listing date (재상장일) on KRX (Source: investchosun 2026-01-14, smartbizn 2026-01-14)
~Jul-Aug 2026: Korean Commercial Act audit-committee aggregate 3% voting cap effective for large companies (HC qualif...
Aug–Dec 2026: Post-spin institutional rebalancing (forced-seller dynamics on SpinCo holders); RemainCo single-thesis ...
Mar 2027: AGM (next regular cycle) — first AGM under hybrid format
